chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2959 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of bail application 27.01.2025. Mr. Farukh Usman, advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Nasir, advocate has filed power on behalf of complainant. Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicants are seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.254/2024 U/s 147,149,506, 504 PPC of P.S. Chakiwara, Karachi. Applicants are present on interim pre arrest bail and matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. As per brief facts, applicants are students of college of Nursing (Male) Govt. of Sindh at Lyari, Karachi, against them this FIR has been registered by Principal Mst. Nasreen alleging that applicants barged into her office and misbehaved with her, abused her and issued threats of murder to her. They also broke some furniture. The offences with which the applicants are booked are however bailable. 3. Learned DPG has not opposed the bail in view of this fact, however, learned counsel for complainant has contested the case of applicants on the ground that they habitually misbehaving with Principal and another FIR after one week of this FIR was also registered against them. 4. Be that as it may since in this case all the offences are bailable and in bailable offence bail is right of the accused, this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicants is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
